bead.title: Strip dangling deps during tracker merge
bead.description:
PROBLEM: ddx can create phantom dependency edges during tracker conflict resolution when dependency rows are merged even though the target bead record is absent from both active beads.jsonl data and the archive. These dangling dependencies keep affected beads from readiness forever because queue classification treats missing dependency targets as unsatisfied.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE: cli/internal/bead/merge.go:162 unions dependency lists with mergeObjectLists(dependencyMergeKey, ...) but does not perform referential-integrity validation against the merged active bead set plus archived bead IDs. Parent dependency edges can merge in while child records from a dropped branch do not, leaving dependencies[].depends_on_id values with no target record.

PROPOSED FIX: After dependency union in MergeTrackerConflictJSONL, filter each bead's Dependencies so any dependency whose depends_on_id is absent from the merged active bead ID set and the archive sibling ID set is removed. Mirror the archive-aware ID loading used by the existing doctor dangling_dep repair, or route the merged result through a shared archive-aware referential-integrity pass if one already exists locally.

NON-SCOPE: The doctor dangling_dep finding and Store.updateBead guard are already landed; do not redo them. Do not change readiness semantics here. Do not address import-time dangling deps or worktree-prefix ID contamination in this child bead.

CONTEXT: Cross-machine convergence already relies on doctor --fix bumping updated_at and the supervisor union resolver keeping newest-updated_at records, so pruned records propagate. This child is only about stopping new phantoms at the merge layer.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add TestMergeTrackerConflictJSONL_StripsDanglingDependenciesArchiveAware covering cli/internal/bead/merge.go: it feeds a merge where a bead has a dependency whose target is absent from the merged active set and archive, then asserts the merged output removes that dependency.
2. The same test, or TestMergeTrackerConflictJSONL_PreservesArchiveBackedDependencies, asserts a dependency whose target exists only in the archive sibling is preserved.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... passes.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
